function.message: I could not complete the OCR request because one of the five specified source files does not exist: `50_finance/purchases/_2026_02_25__eur_000036__bill__family_map_wall_board.md`. The other four files are present and readable, but the workflow/rulebook requires full completion of the listed request and forbids partial completion when required data is missing.
function.rulebook_notes: Applied process-next-inbox-item workflow and inbox rule to treat request as non-canonical and verify files. Applied clarification discipline: do not silently complete a partial task when one required file is missing.
function.outcome_justification: The explicit requested input list contains five files, and one path is missing from the filesystem (read returned file-not-found; subsequent search found it only as text in the inbox note). Completing only four would be an incomplete/partial result, so clarification is required.
